2348500.name: The Paths We Cross
2348500.description:
Play as Haveo, a knight on his way to the city of Lavyn. However he finds himself cursed by a strange object he discovered in a dilapidated fortress.

Now forced to expand a strange entity's influence by activating and defending stone cores he needs to explore Lavyn and its surroundings to try and find a way to free himself.  Fight your way through adversaries and creatures who will try to stand in your way.

To aid you in your quest you will need to gather allies and discover new abilities, as well as tools.

Features

  • Explore and discover the secrets of Lavyn and its surroundings.

  • Find the stone cores and protect them in battles.

  • Wooden workers will help you build defences during battles.

  • Build mighty towers with different offensive and economical constructs.

  • Increase your strength by gathering materials and offer them to ancient beings.

  • Trade with merchants.

  • Befriend characters who will aid Haveo in his mission.

  • 2D Pixelart visuals layered in a 3D space.

  • A mix between Metroidvania and Tower Defense / RTS.
